title: poa rothii
intro: Poa rothii, also known as Roth's meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to the highlands of New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa rothii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Poa rothii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a poultice to treat various health conditions.
